name: list
description: Styled unordered or ordered list with ListItem

meta.name: List
meta.description: Styled unordered or ordered list with ListItem

props.name: as
props.description: The HTML element to render as.

examples.title: Unmarked
examples.description: Keeps list semantics without visual markers

whenToUse: Presenting a set of related items as a bulleted or numbered list
Conveying sequence with an ordered list (as="ol")
Keeping list semantics while hiding visual markers (marker="none")
whenNotToUse: Tabular data with multiple columns — use DataTable
Interactive navigation items — use SideNav or a menu

antiPatterns.bad: A stack of <Text> rows used as a visual list
antiPatterns.why: Real list markup lets screen readers announce item count and position

related.name: Text
related.reason: ListItem content is typically body Text

intent.a11yRationale: Renders native <ul>/<ol> with <li> children so assistive tech announces the list and its length; marker="none" hides bullets visually without removing list semantics

flexibility.note: disc/decimal/none chosen to match content and visual needs
Spacing and text color must resolve to --cascivo-* tokens
